title: Biderectional IO buffer insertion
code_blocks:
read_verilog bidirtest.v
tribuf -logic
synth -top bidirtest
iopadmap -bits -inpad IBUF O:PAD -outpad OBUF I:PAD -tinoutpad IOBUF ENA:O:I:PAD bidirtest
write_verilog -noattr proj_iotemp.v

4. Executing IOPADMAP pass (mapping inputs/outputs to IO-PAD cells).
Mapping port bidirtest.BI[0] using IOBUF.
Mapping port bidirtest.A using IBUF.
Mapping port bidirtest.EO using IBUF.
Mapping port bidirtest.Q using OBUF.
